name: cursor-config-hardening
description: Cursor-only hardening plugin with deterministic safety and supply-chain checks.

interface.shortDescription: Apply and verify Cursor-only hardening baseline.
interface.longDescription: Installs a Cursor-only baseline and verifies deterministic safety, link integrity, and supply-chain gating.
defaultPrompt: Apply Cursor-only baseline to this repository.
Run plugin doctor and show failing checks.
Create missing baseline files and verify deterministic gates.
